note: Manual analysis - Google Places API key expired. Data sourced from web research.

competitors.name: Lamari GYM
competitors.location: Centro Comercial Bahía de las Dunas, Calle Mar Mediterráneo, 03177 San Fulgencio
competitors.description: Small group training studio, 200m², sessions 2-3x/week, 55min planned sessions. Boutique-style, not a full gym.

competitors.name: Quesada Fitness GYM
competitors.location: Ciudad Quesada (Rojales, ~5km from San Fulgencio center)
competitors.description: Full 3-story gym with weights, cardio, studios, kickboxing/boxing club, juice bar, sauna. 270m² floor. Very active community (competitions, international events). Personal training €25/hr. Inductions €10.

competitors.name: CrossFit Dolores
competitors.description: Affiliated CrossFit box on the road between Dolores and San Fulgencio.

competitors.name: La Marina Camping Resort Gym
competitors.description: Resort gym with 90m² studio, cycling, aerobics, Zumba etc. Primarily for resort guests.

competition.summary: Very low local competition. Only 1 boutique studio IN San Fulgencio itself (Lamari GYM). The main competitor is Quesada Fitness in Ciudad Quesada (~5km), which is large and well-established. CrossFit Dolores is niche. Big opportunity gap for a full-service gym directly in San Fulgencio.

demographics.key_insight: 77% foreign origin (2011 census), still ~67% non-Spanish (2025). Dominated by British/Northern European retirees. Large 65+ population (42.8%). Working age 18-64 is 47.2%. Very expat-heavy community.

accessibility.transport: Limited public transport. Car-dependent area. Main access via CV-860 and CV-855.
accessibility.parking: Generally easy - suburban/rural area with ample parking

travel_analysis.note: Isochrone API not available (API key expired). Estimated travel times.
travel_analysis.walking_limited: Very car-dependent area. Walking catchment minimal.

rental_market.note: No Idealista/Fotocasa API available. San Fulgencio is an affordable area with mostly residential properties, many owned by expats.

score.recommendation: Interessanter Standort mit klarer Marktlücke, aber Zielgruppen-Risiken.
risk_factors: Sehr hoher Anteil 65+ (42.8%) - weniger typische Gym-Zielgruppe
Quesada Fitness ist ein starker, etablierter Wettbewerber in 5km Entfernung
opportunities: KEINE echte Gym-Konkurrenz direkt IN San Fulgencio (nur 1 Boutique-Studio)
Marktlücke: Kein vollwertiges Fitnessstudio im Ort
Einzugsgebiet 25-35k durch La Marina + umliegende Orte
Senioren-Fitness als Nische (Silver Fitness, Rehabilitation, Mobility)
Potenzial für hybrides Konzept: Gym + Wellness/Physio für ältere Zielgruppe
